title: polygala obscura var. genuina
intro: Polygala obscura var. genuina, also known as False Aspleen, is a perennial herb belonging to the Polygalaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Polygala obscura var. genuina is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
